name: skribble.io
description: Multiplayer skribbl clone with Express and Socket.IO

scripts.fix-port: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$listeners = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($listeners) { $listeners | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Port 3000 cleared'; } else { Write-Host 'Port 3000 already free'; }"
